programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: After being persuaded by a wealthy businessman to conduct an aerial tour of Isla Sorna, InGen's second site for a failed Jurassic Park experiment, Dr. Alan Grant discovers the true reason for his invitation. A tragic accident maroons the party of seven, and they must attempt to escape with their lives.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: In this action-comedy, unusual circumstances find big, brawny cop John Kimble (Arnold Schwarzenegger) posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to apprehend major drug lord Cullen Crisp (Richard Tyson), as well as his ruthless accomplice and mother, Eleanor (Carroll Baker). While pretending to be a kid-friendly instructor, Kimble falls for pretty fellow teacher Joyce Palmieri (Penelope Ann Miller)

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges are mistaken for as professors at Mildew College.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges are artists living in Paris; when the landlord comes after the overdue rent, the boys skip out and wind up joining the French Foreign Legion.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: In Steven Spielberg's massive blockbuster, paleontologists Alan Grant (Sam Neill) and Ellie Sattler (Laura Dern) and mathematician Ian Malcolm (Jeff Goldblum) are among a select group chosen to tour an island theme park populated by dinosaurs created from prehistoric DNA. While the park's mastermind, billionaire John Hammond (Richard Attenborough), assures everyone that the facility is safe, they

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Commodus (Joaquin Phoenix) takes power and strips rank from Maximus (Russell Crowe), one of the favored generals of his predecessor and father, Emperor Marcus Aurelius, the great stoical philosopher. Maximus is then relegated to fighting to the death in the gladiator arenas.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The CIA and Deadheads; a K-pop "Black Ocean"; the subject of "You're So Vain.".

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: An exploration of Jimi Hendrix kidnapped; Slipknot or Burger King; David Koresh using music as a recruiting tool.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Bobbie Gentry; the Fyre Festival and Ja Rule's career; Phil Collins' music.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Kylie Jenner vs. Kylie Minogue; scorpions and the Cold War; Wu-Tang's multi-million dollar treasure.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Revisiting shocking and surprising stories in rock 'n' roll; featuring bands and musicians such as AC/DC, Tina Turner, Jim Morrison and Aerosmith.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Country music takes center stage as we reveal the most unbelievable stories to have hit that world featuring notable artists such as The Chicks, Garth Brooks, LeAnn Rimes, Trisha Yearwood, The Allman Brothers and Reba McEntire.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Was Brian Jones of the Rolling Stones murdered?; did Huey Lewis bust Ray Parker Jr. for stealing "Ghostbusters?"; did President Trump send the Secret Service after Eminem?

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Examining what constitutes the murder of Sam Cooke; whether American Idol is rigged; Pat Benatar's ultimate rock-and-roll love story.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Examining why Kris Kristofferson stole an Army Helicopter; if John Lennon was blessed and cursed by the Number 9; and if Michael Jackson invented the Moonwalk.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Examining if country legend Patsy Cline predicted her own death; if Quiet Riot engaged in self-sabotage; why Katy Perry was in a lawsuit involving Nuns and the Pope.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Asking if Napster destroyed the concept of albums, but ultimately saved the music industry; the death of Keith Moon's chauffeur; the people behind "Who Let the Dogs Out?".

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: What is the true story behind Billy Ray Cyrus' smash hit Achy Breaky Heart?; who is responsible for Janet Jackson's wardrobe malfunction?; did Led Zeppelin really worship Satan?

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: Find out which Heart-titled songs make our list as rock experts like Sebastian Bach, EG Daily, Alice Cooper and more count us down!

programme.title: The Top Ten Revealed
programme.desc: A countdown of double studio albums; Lita Ford, Rikki Rockett, Frankie Banali (Quiet Riot), Geoff Tate, and Jeff Pilson (Foreigner).

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Lara Croft is the fiercely independent daughter of an eccentric adventurer who vanished years earlier. Hoping to solve the mystery of her father's disappearance, Croft embarks on a perilous journey to his last-known destination -- a fabled tomb on a mythical island that might be somewhere off the coast of Japan. The stakes couldn't be higher as Lara must rely on her sharp mind, blind faith and stu

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar (Andy Serkis) and his apes are forced into a deadly conflict with an army of humans led by a ruthless colonel (Woody Harrelson). After the apes suffer unimaginable losses, Caesar wrestles with his darker instincts and begins his own mythic quest to avenge his kind. As the journey finally brings them face to face, Caesar and the colonel are pitted against each other in an epic battle that wi

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After the death of Richard the Lion-Hearted, a skilled archer named Robin Longstride travels to Nottingham, where villagers suffer under a despotic sheriff and crippling taxation. He meets and falls in love with a spirited widow, Marion, although she is skeptical of his motives. Hoping to win her heart and save the village, Robin gathers a band of warriors to fight corruption in Nottingham, little

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through

programme.title: Y2K
programme.desc: On the last night of 1999, two high school juniors crash a New Year's Eve party, only to find themselves fighting for their lives when the terror of Y2K becomes a reality and all machines rise up against humanity.

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks
programme.desc: When 15-year-old surfing phenomenon Jay Moriarty discovers that the mythic Mavericks surf break, one of the biggest waves on Earth, actually exists near his California home, he becomes determined to conquer it. Jay enlists the aid of local surfing legend Frosty Hesson to train him to ride the Mavericks and live to tell about it. As Jay and Frosty carry on their quest to achieve the impossible, the

programme.title: Hitchcock
programme.desc: Following his great success with "North by Northwest," director Alfred Hitchcock makes a daring choice for his next project: an adaptation of Robert Bloch's novel "Psycho." When the studio refuses to back the picture, Hitchcock decides to pay for it himself in exchange for a percentage of the profits. His wife, Alma Reville, has serious reservations about the film but supports him nonetheless. Sti

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against the

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

programme.title: Papillon
programme.desc: The epic story of Henri Papillon Charrière, a safecracker from the Parisian underworld who is framed for murder and condemned to life in the notorious penal colony on Devil's Island. Determined to regain his freedom, Papillon forms an unlikely alliance with convicted counterfeiter Louis Dega, who in exchange for protection, agrees to finance Papillon's escape.

programme.title: Pawn
programme.desc: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

programme.title: Room
programme.desc: Held captive for years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

programme.title: Leave No Trace
programme.desc: A father and daughter live a perfect but mysterious existence in Forest Park, a beautiful nature reserve near Portland, Ore., rarely making contact with the world. But when a small mistake tips them off to authorities, they are sent on an increasingly erratic journey in search of a place to call their own.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Barry Seal, a TWA pilot, is recruited by the CIA to provide reconnaissance on the burgeoning communist threat in Central America and soon finds himself in charge of one of the biggest covert CIA operations in the history of the United States. The operation spawns the birth of the Medellin cartel and almost brings down the Reagan White House.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: Industrious high school senior Vee Delmonico (Emma Roberts) is tired of living life on the sidelines. Pressured by her friends, Vee decides to join Nerve, a popular online game that challenges players to accept a series of dares. It's not long before the adrenaline-fueled competition requires her to perform increasingly dangerous stunts. When Nerve begins to take a sinister turn, Vee finds herself

programme.title: Inconceivable
programme.desc: Angela develops a friendship with a mysterious woman named Katie and offers her a job as a live-in nanny. The natural bond soon turns into a dangerous obsession as Katie becomes overly attached to the family's young daughter. Enduring lies and manipulations, Angela and her husband realize that sweet Katie is actually trying to destroy their family from within.

programme.title: Papillon
programme.desc: The epic story of Henri Papillon Charrière, a safecracker from the Parisian underworld who is framed for murder and condemned to life in the notorious penal colony on Devil's Island. Determined to regain his freedom, Papillon forms an unlikely alliance with convicted counterfeiter Louis Dega, who in exchange for protection, agrees to finance Papillon's escape.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Biollante
programme.desc: A monster dinosaur wrecks Tokyo some more and meets a monster plant created from his own cells.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. King Ghidorah
programme.desc: Time-travelers' efforts to prevent a dinosaur's mutation result in the creation of a three-headed dragon that terrorizes Japan.

programme.title: Godzilla, King of the Monsters!
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. programme.title: Working Girls
programme.desc: College graduate Molly (Louise Smith), trying to bankroll her own business, works as a high-priced New York City escort. As a lesbian, she's able to keep her emotional distance from the clients, who range from cynically exploitative to desperately needy. But her open ambition to rise above her current station rubs many of her coworkers the wrong way, especially the combative, street-smart Dawn (Am

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants

programme.title: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The rise of country music legend Johnny Cash (Joaquin Phoenix) begins with his days as a boy growing up on the family farm, where he struggles under the scorn of his father (Robert Patrick). As the years pass, Cash ends up in Memphis, Tenn., with his wife, Vivian (Ginnifer Goodwin), and breaks into the music scene after finding his trademark sound. programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falli

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the to

programme.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
programme.desc: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgen

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Locked away, a young woman named Babydoll retreats to a fantasy world where she is free to go wherever her mind takes her. Determined to fight for real freedom, she finds four women -- Rocket, Blondie, Amber and Sweet Pea -- to join together to escape the terrible fate that awaits them. programme.title: Rodan
programme.desc: A bug-eating pterodactyl flies out of a coal mine and wrecks Japan with sonic booms.

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. To save the village and protect Gwen, he must slay the bloodthirsty beast, but he contends with a horrifying famil

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Beneath Easter Island, in a giant factory that manufactures the world's Easter candy, the popular rabbit is preparing to pass the mantle to his son, E.B. (Russell Brand). But E.B. has no interest in the job and would rather be a drummer. He runs away to Los Angeles, where an unemployed slacker named Fred O'Hare (James Marsden) accidentally runs into him. Feigning injury, E.B. tricks Fred into givi

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab through the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Steve Brooks (Perry King), a sexist womanizer, is killed by a group of his angry former lovers. In heaven, he makes a bargain with God for redemption and agrees to return to Earth. Once there, he must have a sincere relationship with a female and make her fall in love with him. If not, Steve's soul will become the property of the devil (Bruce Martyn Payne). programme.title: Volunteers
programme.desc: Hoping to avoid gambling debts, rich playboy Lawrence Bourne (Tom Hanks) stows away on a plane of Peace Corps volunteers set for Thailand. Once aboard, he meets the outrageously affable Tom Tuttle (John Candy), who shows him the ropes. After landing, the crew is stationed in a small town where they are to construct a bridge. programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, special operatives Valerian and Laureline work together to maintain order throughout the human territories. Under assignment from the minister of defense, the duo embarks on a mission to Alpha, an ever-expanding metropolis where diverse species gather to share knowledge and culture. programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: Alex Cross (Tyler Perry) works as a detective/psychologist for the Detroit Police Department along with his lifelong friend, Tommy Kane (Edward Burns), and detective Monica Ashe (Rachel Nichols). Cross' latest case puts him on a collision course with Picasso (Matthew Fox), a cunning serial killer whose ultimate target is multinational industrialist Giles Mercier (Jean Reno). programme.title: The Front Room
programme.desc: Everything goes to hell for newly pregnant Belinda after her mother-in-law moves in. As the diabolical guest tries to get her claws on the child, Belinda must draw the line somewhere.

programme.title: Hitchcock
programme.desc: Following his great success with "North by Northwest," director Alfred Hitchcock makes a daring choice for his next project: an adaptation of Robert Bloch's novel "Psycho." When the studio refuses to back the picture, Hitchcock decides to pay for it himself in exchange for a percentage of the profits. His wife, Alma Reville, has serious reservations about the film but supports him nonetheless. Sti

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. programme.title: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: Tree Gelbman is a blissfully self-centered collegian who wakes up on her birthday in the bed of a student named Carter. As the morning goes on, Tree gets the eerie feeling that she's experienced the events of this day before. When a masked killer suddenly takes her life in a brutal attack, she once again magically wakes up in Carter's dorm room unharmed. Now, the frightened young woman must relive

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Alex Browning is embarking on a trip to Paris. He experiences a premonition -- he sees the plane explode moments after leaving the ground. Insisting that everyone get off the plane, Alex and seven other people are forced to disembark. All watch as the plane actually explodes in a fireball. He and the other survivors have briefly cheated death, but will not be able to evade their fate for very long

programme.title: Final Destination 2
programme.desc: Kimberly (A.J. Cook) has a premonition of a horrible highway accident killing multiple people -- including her and her friends. She blocks the cars behind her on the ramp from joining traffic -- and as a police trooper (Michael Landes) arrives, the accident actually happens. Now, Death is stalking this group of mistaken survivors -- and one by one they are dying as they were supposed to on the hig

programme.title: Final Destination 3
programme.desc: Six years after a group of high-school students first cheated death, another teen (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) has a premonition that she and her friends will be involved in a horrifying roller-coaster accident. When the vision proves true, the student and her fellow survivors must deal with the repercussions of cheating the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Final Destination 5
programme.desc: During a bus ride with his colleagues to a corporate retreat, Sam (Nicholas D'Agosto) experiences a horrifying vision: the suspension bridge that they -- and many others -- are crossing starts to crumble around them. When his vision ends and, almost immediately, starts to come true, Sam takes quick action that saves a number of people, including his girlfriend, Molly (Emma Bell), and his best frie

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: Scott and Kate Johansen must figure out a way to earn some money after their daughter's scholarship falls through. When all else fails, the desperate couple join forces with their neighbor Frank to start an underground casino in his home. As the cash rolls in and the good times fly, Scott and Kate soon learn that they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: In a series of interconnected stories, various Los Angeles residents (Jessica Alba, Jessica Biel, Bradley Cooper) wend their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day. As the holiday unfolds, they experience first dates, longtime commitments, youthful crushes and connections to old flames.

programme.title: Due Date
programme.desc: Peter Highman will be a dad for the first time when his wife gives birth in five days. He intends to catch a flight home from Atlanta so he can be there for the delivery, but a chance encounter with aspiring actor Ethan Tremblay throws a monkey wrench into his plans. Desperate to reach his wife before their baby is born, Peter's sanity is tested when he must take a road trip cross-country with dog

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: The Rock
programme.desc: FBI chemical warfare expert Stanley Goodspeed (Nicolas Cage) is sent on an urgent mission with a former British spy, John Patrick Mason (Sean Connery), to stop Gen. Francis X. Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. Hummel demands $100 million in war reparations to be paid to the families of slain servicemen who died on covert operations. Afte

programme.title: Shot Caller
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, a gang member finds himself forced by his leaders to orchestrate a major crime with a rival gang.

programme.title: Show Dogs
programme.desc: After a failed attempt to recover a stolen baby panda, police dog Max reluctantly teams up with a human FBI agent named Frank. A hot tip leads Max and Frank to Las Vegas for the world's most exclusive dog show. To find the panda, Max goes undercover as a contestant to get the lowdown from his fellow canines. With help from their new friends, the crime-fighting duo must now foil another kidnapping

programme.title: Time Bandits
programme.desc: Young history buff Kevin (Craig Warnock) can scarcely believe it when six dwarfs emerge from his closet one night. Former employees of the Supreme Being (Ralph Richardson), they've purloined a map charting all the holes in the fabric of time and are using it to steal treasures from different historical eras. Taking Kevin with them, they variously drop in on Napoleon (Ian Holm), Robin Hood (John Cl

programme.title: Walkabout
programme.desc: Under the pretense of having a picnic, a geologist (John Meillon) takes his teenage daughter (Jenny Agutter) and 6-year-old son (Lucien John) into the Australian outback and attempts to shoot them. When he fails, he turns the gun on himself, and the two city-bred children must contend with harsh wilderness alone. programme.desc: After the death of her foster sister, Leila takes a DNA test and discovers the identity of her biological father and sister. However, when her father is tragically murdered, she soon finds herself in more danger than she ever could have imagined.

programme.title: Stolen by Their Father
programme.desc: Fueled by her own childhood kidnapping, Lizbeth fights to get her daughters back from her ex.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Ferris Bueller (Matthew Broderick) has an uncanny skill at cutting classes and getting away with it. Intending to make one last duck-out before graduation, Ferris calls in sick, "borrows" a Ferrari, and embarks on a one-day journey through the streets of Chicago. On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: On a magical night when they are in their 20s, Jonathan (John Cusack) meets Sara (Kate Beckinsale). He finds it love at first sight, but Sara believes in destiny. After 10 years the two -- with 3,000 miles between them -- must decide if fate wants them to be together again. When love feels like magic, it is called destiny; when destiny has a sense of humor, it is serendipity.

programme.title: I Love You, Man
programme.desc: As his wedding day approaches, Peter Klaven (Paul Rudd) realizes he has no one to act as his best man. Through a series of "man-dates," he finds Sydney Fife (Jason Segel), and the pair become instant friends. But as Peter's "bro-mance" with Sydney grows stronger, it threatens his relationship with his fiancee (Rashida Jones), forcing Peter to make a choice.

programme.title: A Fish Called Wanda
programme.desc: British gangster George Thomason (Tom Georgeson) and his hapless aide, Ken Pile (Michael Palin), draft a pair of arrogant Americans, grifter Wanda Gerschwitz (Jamie Lee Curtis) and weapons expert Otto West (Kevin Kline), for a massive diamond heist. programme.title: Lone Wolf McQuade
programme.desc: Texas ranger J.J. McQuade (Chuck Norris) likes to work by himself, until a Latino state trooper, Kayo Ramos (Robert Beltran), needs his help to find out who hijacked a U.S. Army convoy and hurt Ramos' daughter. programme.desc: Alex Browning is embarking on a trip to Paris. He experiences a premonition -- he sees the plane explode moments after leaving the ground. programme.title: Final Destination 3
programme.desc: Six years after a group of high-school students first cheated death, another teen (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) has a premonition that she and her friends will be involved in a horrifying roller-coaster accident. When the vision proves true, the student and her fellow survivors must deal with the repercussions of cheating the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Final Destination 5

programme.title: The Final Destination

Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: Scott and Kate Johansen must figure out a way to earn some money after their daughter's scholarship falls through. When all else fails, the desperate couple join forces with their neighbor Frank to start an underground casino in his home. As the cash rolls in and the good times fly, Scott and Kate soon learn that they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2

programme.title: Slingshot

programme.title: Heatwave

programme.title: Kickback

programme.title: Outlaw Posse

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. programme.title: Roofman

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelle's forthcoming wedding. programme.title: American Reunion

Struck by how much their lives have changed, they set out to relive the sexual misadventures of their adolescence, but only end up making bigger fools of themselves than they did as teenagers. Comedy sequel to the American Pie movies, starring Jason Biggs and Alyson Hannigan.

Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days

programme.desc: Daisy Ridley stars as a lonely and socially awkward woman who struggles to make a connection with a friendly co-worker who takes her on a date. Surreal drama.

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: A group of wisecracking penguins join forces with an undercover organisation to stop a dastardly villain. Animated adventure with the voice of Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: Tim Burton's Corpse Bride

programme.desc: Danny Ocean rounds up his band of crooks for one last heist. programme.title: Ocean's 8
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of brother Danny, light-fingered Debbie Ocean plans to steal the Toussaint, a $150million necklace from Vogue's Met Gala, with the 'help' of a famous actress. Crime caper, starring Sandra Bullock, Cate Blanchett, Anne Hathaway and Mindy Kaling.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegas's biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderbergh's crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A young athlete descends into a world of terror when he's invited to train with a legendary champion whose charisma curdles into something darker.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Language/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Race Against Time
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List is about the race against time. From a deadly threat in Fuze to The Desperate Hour, where Naomi Watts faces every parent's nightmare - the clock is ticking.

programme.title: LifeHack
programme.desc: Kyle and his friends hack for fun, pranking online scammers. Seeking a bigger thrill, they target a billionaire's cryptocurrency..

programme.title: Carolina Caroline
programme.desc: A young woman joins a charming con man on the run, leaving a trail of crime and passion as they hustle through the Southeast in search of her estranged mother.

programme.title: No Ordinary Heist
programme.desc: Inspired by the 2004 Northern Bank robbery, two feuding bank employees are forced to execute Ireland's biggest heist after criminals kidnap their families.

programme.title: The Choral
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: No Ordinary Heist
programme.desc: Inspired by the 2004 Northern Bank robbery, two feuding bank employees are forced to execute Ireland's biggest heist after criminals kidnap their families.

programme.title: Carolina Caroline
programme.desc: A young woman joins a charming con man on the run, leaving a trail of crime and passion as they hustle through the Southeast in search of her estranged mother.

programme.title: LifeHack
programme.desc: Kyle and his friends hack for fun, pranking online scammers. Seeking a bigger thrill, they target a billionaire's cryptocurrency..

programme.title: Black Phone 2
programme.desc: Finn killed his abductor, becoming the sole survivor of The Grabber. But true evil transcends death and the phone is ringing again.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow: Live
programme.desc: Die. Repeat: Army officer Tom Cruise gets stuck in a time-loop that sees him doing battle with aliens time and again.

programme.title: The Front Room
programme.desc: All hell moves in. A newly pregnant couple take in their estranged mother-in-law, who has dangerous and controlling parenting methods. Thriller.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: In the last city on Earth, super assassin Charlize Theron fights to overthrow the sinister government. Futuristic action with Jonny Lee Miller. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A man with amnesia teams up with a tough survivalist during a zombie-like outbreak. Together, they navigate dangers and search for the amnesiac's missing girlfriend.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Re-imagining of the classic horror from Stephen King's bestselling novel. A family moves to a rural house, and things soon start to go wrong.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: A wanderer on a post-apocalyptic Earth, comes across a mother and daughter and offers to help them reach safety. Together, they embark on a quest that could save mankind.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Hip horror movie about four female students who band together and become witches. Starring Fairuza Balk, Robin Tunney and Neve Campbell.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: Tasked by Frankenstein to create a companion, Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman involved in a car accident wakes up in a cramped underground bunker with two men she's never met. Tense thriller.

programme.title: Strange Darling
programme.desc: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer's vicious murder spree.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: The Legend Of Tarzan
programme.desc: Years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back to Africa and into a trap. Reimagining of the classic tale starring Alexander Skarsgard.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Delightful big-screen adaptation of the beloved books.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: When everyone's favourite marmalade-loving bear is framed, the Brown family must fight to clear his name. Top family sequel with Hugh Grant.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: The Oscar-winning musical epic about the untold story of the Witches of Oz makes its debut on the big screen, starring Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship holds the key to Vikings and dragons forging a new future together as an ancient threat rears its head.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: Four misfits are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into a bizarre cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: When genetically-engineered dinosaurs break loose on a remote island, a group of experts are on the menu. Classic from Steven Spielberg. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Transformers prequel starring Hailee Steinfeld as a teenager who discovers and revives the battle-scarred Bumblebee in a junkyard. With John Cena and Justin Theroux.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: A top-secret mission to the mysterious Skull Island descends into chaos when the local wildlife proves far from welcoming. Tom Hiddleston stars.

programme.title: The Legend Of Tarzan

programme.desc: Anime fantasy set in the iconic world of Middle Earth, as legendary king Helm Hammerhand and his family defend their kingdom.

programme.title: The Chronicles Of Riddick
programme.desc: On a distant planet, Vin Diesel battles the merciless Necromongers who plan to wipe out all of humanity. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series Of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans dare to outwit their fiendish uncle Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) in an amusingly grim fairytale. With Meryl Streep and Billy Connolly.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: Starry remake of EB White's classic tale. Dakota Fanning is the farmer's daughter who, with the help of smart spider Charlotte, tries to save pig Wilbur from the butcher.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, a young girl called Lyra comes into possession of a magical compass that is the beginning of an epic quest to save her friends and her world.

programme.title: Lord Of The Rings: The War...
programme.desc: Anime fantasy set in the iconic world of Middle Earth, as legendary king Helm Hammerhand and his family defend their kingdom.

programme.title: Murder By Numbers

programme.title: The Girl On The Train
programme.desc: Adaptation of the hit book starring Emily Blunt as an alcoholic divorcee caught up in a missing person case that sends shockwaves throughout her life.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity

After years of estrangement, the older man shows up unexpectedly on the eve of his son's wedding day, sending the young man's life into a tailspin. Donny wants desperately to reconnect with Todd, but he must now deal with the r

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Volcanologist Harry Dalton and Mayor Rachel Wando finally convince the unbelieving populace that the big one is about to hit and that they need to evacuate immediately, only to discover her two children have gone up the mountain to get their grandmother. With Earth's clock racing against them, they must rescue the kids and grandma before the volcano explodes in a fury of flame and ash a million ti

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Unlike their heroic counterparts on the force, desk-bound NYPD detectives Gamble and Hoitz garner no headlines as they work day to day. Gamble relishes his job as a paper pusher, but Hoitz is itching to get back on the street and make a name for himself. When a seemingly minor case turns out to be a big deal, the two cops get the opportunity to finally prove to their comrades that they have the ri

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Attempting to win the favor of the newly divorced Suzanne (Nia Long), Nick (Ice Cube) offers to accompany her children, Lindsey (Aleisha Allen) and Kevin (Philip Bolden), on a flight from Portland, Ore., to Canada to see their mother. A mishap with a corkscrew and a metal detector gets the troupe banned from the flight, however, so Nick is forced to drive the kids in his prized Lincoln Navigator.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne decide to move to the suburbs to create a better life for children Lindsey and Kevin. The contractor they hired to renovate their home has a rather odd way of doing business, complicating the family's move. Matters spiral further out of control when the contractor clashes with Nick but bonds with Suzanne and the children.

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: A gifted singer/songwriter, Charlotte hires Will Burton, a new guy in town, to manage her fledgling rock band. She wants one thing from him: to help her win a contest against her ex-boyfriend in an upcoming battle of the bands. Charlotte's band comes together and seems to have a real shot at victory, while Will and dynamic guitarist Sa5m begin to make some beautiful music of their own.

programme.title: Tarzan
programme.desc: Tarzan and Jane face a mercenary army dispatched by the evil CEO of Greystoke Energies.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Newly hired as a producer on a national morning-news program called "Daybreak," Becky Fuller (Rachel McAdams) decides to revitalize the low-rated show by bringing in legendary anchorman Mike Pomeroy (Harrison Ford). Pomeroy, however, refuses to do puff pieces like celebrity gossip and fashion, and clashes with his co-host (Diane Keaton). Meanwhile, Becky's romance with a colleague begins to unrave

programme.title: Doogal
programme.desc: Florence and her animal friends live in the Enchanted Village, which is under the care of Zebedee, a kindly wizard. However, a dark cloud is approaching this sunny world. After being encased in ice for eons, Zeebad, the evil double of Zebedee, reappears and threatens to start another ice age. The only way to stop him is for Florence and friends to find three magic diamonds before he does.

programme.desc: Two teens discover that their pet dog Toby can hack a computer, fight bad guys and talk.

Landing on an inhabited planet, the space-faring simians must help depose a planetary tyrant, then find a way back to their own world.

programme.title: Catching Dust
programme.desc: Geena finally decides to leave her criminal husband Clyde and their isolated Texas hideout, but a couple from New York suddenly arrives. Ignoring the risks, she convinces Clyde to let them stay, a decision with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Based on a story by famed science fiction writer Philip K. Dick, "Minority Report" is an action-detective thriller set in Washington D.C. in 2054, where police utilize a psychic technology to arrest and convict murderers before they commit their crime. Tom Cruise plays the head of this Precrime unit and is himself accused of the future murder of a man he hasn't even met.

programme.title: The Dangerous Lives of Altar Boys
programme.desc: Francis Doyle (Emile Hirsch) and Tim Sullivan (Kieran Culkin), and their closest friends, are fighting the stultifying repression of their parish school. Foremost among the forces of evil is the stern and disapproving nun, Sister Assumpta (Jodie Foster), who rules their lives. She seizes their artwork one day, setting the boys on an obsessed trail of revenge that ultimately changes their lives.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: After murdering King Duncan (David Thewlis) and seizing the throne, Macbeth (Michael Fassbender) becomes consumed with guilt and paranoia as the tyrannical ruler of Scotland.

The high-flying trio have the adventure of a lifetime when they must prevent a Russian bug (Tim Curry) from sabotaging the mission.

programme.title: The Night Clerk
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.desc: Long-buried secrets threaten to tear a couple apart.

programme.desc: Billionaire and aviation tycoon Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a successful public figure: a director of big-budget Hollywood films such as "Hell's Angels," a passionate lover of Hollywood leading ladies Katharine Hepburn (Cate Blanchett) and Ava Gardner (Kate Beckinsale), and an aviation pioneer who helps build TWA into a major airline. programme.title: Chuck

But before all of that, Chuck Wepner was a liquor salesman and father with a modest prizefighting career whose life changed overnight when, in 1975, he was chosen to take on Ali in a highly publicized title match. programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Breach
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Run

programme.title: Gaslight
programme.desc: Misha returns to her royal family estate after 15 years to visit her estranged father, only to find him missing.

programme.title: Gharwali Baharwali

programme.title: Jhoom Barabar Jhoom
programme.desc: Two strangers pretend to be engaged but fall in love while telling tall tales. With music, color, and chaos, the film celebrates romance, destiny, and the magic of serendipity.

programme.title: Darr
